descEn: Advanced multi-role survey vessel equipped with the latest marine science instrumentation for seabed mapping, hydrographic surveying, and oceanographic research.
descAr: سفينة مسح متعددة الأدوار لرسم خرائط قاع البحر والمسح الهيدروغرافي.
detailEn: The Merkwave Explorer is purpose-built for extended offshore operations in water depths up to 3,000 metres. Her DP2 dynamic positioning system provides precise station-keeping during seabed operations, while the integrated multi-beam echo sounder (MBES) delivers centimetre-accurate seafloor data. The 200m2 laboratory complex houses full geophysical and geotechnical processing capabilities with high-bandwidth VSAT for real-time data transmission.
detailAr: سفينة مبنية للعمليات البحرية الممتدة في أعماق تصل إلى 3000 متر. يوفر نظام DP2 دقة عالية أثناء عمليات قاع البحر.

features.descEn: Class 2 DP system with redundant reference frames, maintaining position within 0.5m in sea states up to Beaufort 6.
features.descAr: نظام تموضع ديناميكي من الفئة 2 مع إطارات مرجعية متكررة.

features.descEn: Kongsberg EM 712 MBES providing full-coverage seafloor mapping from 3m to 3,000m water depth.
features.descAr: جهاز كونغسبرغ EM 712 لرسم خرائط شاملة لقاع البحر.

features.descEn: 200m2 laboratory with full subbottom profiling, sediment core analysis, and real-time data processing.
features.descAr: مختبر 200 متر مربع بقدرات معالجة بيانات جيوفيزيائية.

features.descEn: 5-tonne A-frame over the stern with 6,000m wire capacity for deep-water equipment deployment.
features.descAr: إطار A بسعة 5 أطنان فوق المؤخرة بسعة سلك 6000 متر.

descEn: Heavy-lift offshore support vessel (OSV) with 400-tonne revolving crane, designed for deepwater installation, decommissioning, and subsea construction work.
descAr: سفينة دعم بحري ثقيلة الرفع برافعة دوارة 400 طن لتركيب المنشآت في المياه العميقة.
detailEn: Merkwave Titan is a 130-metre heavy-construction vessel with a 400-tonne revolving crane at amidships. Her 1,500m2 clear deck handles the largest offshore installation campaigns. Two work-class ROV systems rated to 3,000m water depth, a 12-man saturation diving system, and pipeline lay capabilities from S-lay and J-lay make her the backbone of deepwater project delivery.
detailAr: سفينة إنشاء ثقيل بطول 130 متراً برافعة دوارة 400 طن. سطح خالي 1500 متر مربع ونظام غوص تشبعي 12 شخصاً.

features.descEn: Huisman LARC revolving crane with 400t at 32m radius, 90m boom length and 3,000m deepwater wire capacity.
features.descAr: رافعة Huisman LARC بسعة 400 طن على نصف قطر 32 م.

features.descEn: Two Schilling UHD ROVs rated to 3,000m with 200HP TMS and 7-function manipulators for complex deepwater tasks.
features.descAr: مركبتان Schilling UHD ROV قادرتان على 3000 م.

features.descEn: 12-man saturation diving system rated to 300 msw with twin diving bells and dedicated life support.
features.descAr: نظام غوص تشبعي لـ 12 شخصاً مقنن بـ 300 متر.

features.descEn: S-lay and J-lay pipeline installation to 2,500m water depth with 2x200t tensioner capacity.
features.descAr: S-lay و J-lay حتى 2500 م عمق بسعة شد 400 طن.

descEn: Platform Supply Vessel (PSV) optimised for bulk cargo, deck cargo, and liquid mud delivery to offshore platforms in harsh environmental conditions.
descAr: سفينة إمداد منصات بحرية محسّنة لتوصيل البضائع والطين السائل للمنصات.
detailEn: Merkwave Atlas is a 94-metre DP2 platform supply vessel with 970m2 cargo deck and 4,800 DWT. Four CAT 3516C generators provide 8,000 kW driving twin-azimuth electric propulsion for maximum manoeuvrability. Cargo pumping at 300m3/h for liquid mud. Compliant with IMO Tier III NOx and EEDI Phase 3, reflecting Merkwave's commitment to sustainable operations.
detailAr: سفينة إمداد DP2 بطول 94 م وسطح شحن 970 مربع. أربعة مولدات CAT 3516C بإجمالي 8000 كيلووات.

features.descEn: Open deck strengthened to 10t/m2 with 36 x 20ft container positions and full crane coverage.
4 x 500m3 liquid mud tanks, 2 x 350m3 base oil tanks, 400m3 bulk cement with pneumatic transfer at 300m3/h.
features.descAr: 4 خزانات طين 500 ممكع وخزانا زيت 350 ممكع.

features.descEn: Twin azimuth thrusters (2x2,200 kW) with SCR exhaust treatment, meeting IMO Tier III NOx and EEDI Phase 3.
Class 1 firefighting with 2 x 1,200m3/h monitors, foam induction, and 2,400m3/h external cooling.
features.descAr: مكافحة حرائق من الفئة 1 بسعة 2400 ممكع.

descEn: Anchor Handling Tug Supply (AHTS) vessel with 300-tonne bollard pull designed for anchor handling, rig towing, and emergency response in deepwater environments.
descAr: سفينة قطر وتوريد مناولة المراسي AHTS بقوة شد 300 طن لسحب الحفارات.
detailEn: Merkwave Horizon delivers 300 tonnes continuous bollard pull, positioning her among the region's highest-rated vessels for rig towing and deepwater mooring. Her 5,000 kW stern roller accepts wire diameters up to 120mm with 3,000m capacity. Integrated HiPAP 500 USBL systems enable ultra-deepwater anchor operations. Emergency response equipment includes 300m3 OSR storage and FiFi-2 firefighting.
detailAr: قوة شد مستمرة 300 طن. بكرة خلفية 5000 كيلووات تقبل سلك قطر 120 ملم.

features.descEn: Proven 300t bollard pull from four Wartsila 12V32E main engines totalling 28,800 kW with twin CPP propellers.
features.descAr: قوة شد 300 طن بأربعة محركات Wartsila 12V32E.

features.descEn: Shark jaw, KARM stopper, and 5,000 kW TTS drum winch accepting wire up to 120mm with 3,000m capacity.
Integrated chaser, pennant wire, and HiPAP 500 USBL positioning for anchor installation to 2,500m.
features.descAr: نظام HiPAP 500 USBL لتركيب المراسي حتى 2500 م.

features.descEn: 300m3 OSR storage, brush barrier, FiFi-2 firefighting monitors, and Class II oil dispersant spray system.
features.descAr: 300 ممكع تخزين OSR ومكافحة حرائق FiFi-2.
